title: oxydectes malabarica
intro: Oxydectes malabarica, also known as Indian licorice or Malabar licorice, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxydectes malabarica include treating digestive issues such as diarrhea, ulcers, and stomach inflammation, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oxydectes malabarica include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which are often consumed as teas or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
